message:
feat(export,ui,models): rewrite HTML/PDF export pipeline, expand TUI capabilities, improve model downloads

Export pipeline (export.rs — 509 line rewrite):
- Restructure export rendering to produce cleaner, more semantic HTML
  with improved CSS styling for both screen and print media
- Expand PDF export support with better page-break handling and
  typography for code blocks and conversation threads
- Improve error handling and progress reporting throughout the export
  pipeline
- Add new integration tests for export functionality

Self-update removal (lib.rs):
- Remove OWNER/REPO constants and entire run_self_update() function
  for both Unix and Windows platforms, as the curl|bash installer is
  now the canonical update mechanism
- Simplify maybe_prompt_for_update() to remove post-check install logic

Model downloads (model_download.rs):
- Expand download retry logic and progress reporting (148 lines added)
- Improve error context propagation for failed downloads

Source sync (sources/sync.rs):
- Add 75 lines of improvements to source synchronization logic

TUI overhaul (ui/app.rs — 283 additions, staged):
- Major expansion of the terminal UI application state and rendering
- Add new interactive panels and navigation capabilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
